The''' Great Walkway''' on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] connected the [[Czerka Landing Port]] to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] village of [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]]. When the redeemed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] used the walkway to reach the village, they saw a Czerka officer, [[Dehno]], kill a rebellious Wookiee [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], Revan told Dehno that he wouldn't let him enslave or harm another Wookiee again, and persuaded Dehno and his men to abandon Kashyyyk. Later on the walkway, Revan was attacked by [[Kinrath/Legends|kinraths]], [[Mykal/Legends|mykals]], and even a trio of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. When Revan reached the village with [[Zaalbar]], who was banned from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Revan and Zaalbar were brought before [[Chuundar]]. Revan returned to the Great Walkway to take a primitive elevator down to the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]].
